spec: Read numbers.txt (one integer per line). Print the sum of the even numbers.

files.sales.csv:
region,amount
eu,120
us,80
eu,200
kz,400
us,150
kz,60

spec: Read sales.csv (header: region,amount). Print the region with the highest total amount and that total, separated by one space, e.g. `eu 320`.

Read users.json — a JSON list of objects with keys `first` and `last`. Print (to stdout) a compact JSON list (no spaces) of objects with a single key `name` whose value is `first` and `last` joined by one space. Keep order.

files.words.txt:
delta echo alpha delta bravo echo charlie alpha
foxtrot bravo

spec: Read words.txt (whitespace-separated words, possibly multiple lines). Print the unique words sorted ascending, one per line.
expected:
alpha
bravo
charlie
delta
echo
foxtrot

spec: Print the sum of all integers from 1 to 1000 inclusive that are divisible by 3 or by 5.

Read scores.txt (one integer 0-100 per line). Count grades: A is 90+, B is 80-89, C is 70-79, F is below 70. Print one line per grade in the order A, B, C, F as `<letter> <count>`, skipping grades with zero count.
Read inv.json — a JSON object mapping warehouse name to an object mapping item name to quantity. Print one line per item as `<warehouse>.<item> <qty>`, preserving the JSON's order.

files.log.txt:
INFO boot
ERROR disk full
INFO retry
WARN slow
ERROR net down
INFO ok
ERROR disk full again
INFO done

spec: Read log.txt. Print the number of lines containing the substring `ERROR`, then on a second line print the last such line in full.
